title: Canning Operations
summary: Procedure for packaging RTD products into cans.
purpose: To ensure safe, compliant and consistent canning operations.
prerequisites: Released product, approved packaging materials and completed line setup.
safety_notes: Keep clear of moving equipment. Wear hearing protection where required.

steps.title: Verify Packaging Materials
steps.body: Confirm cans, ends, trays and cartons match the production order.

steps.title: Perform Line Clearance
steps.body: Remove all materials from previous production runs.

steps.title: Prepare Filler and Seamer
steps.body: Inspect equipment and confirm readiness.

steps.title: Conduct Start-Up Checks
steps.body: Verify fill volume, seam integrity and coding.

steps.title: Run Production
steps.body: Monitor fill levels, seams and product quality throughout the run.

steps.title: Inspect Product
steps.body: Perform periodic quality checks according to packaging requirements.

steps.title: Reconcile Materials
steps.body: Record can, lid and product usage.

steps.title: Close Production Order
steps.body: Complete all production documentation.

troubleshooting: Stop production immediately if seam integrity falls outside specification.

title: Label Application
summary: Applying product labels accurately and consistently.
purpose: To ensure products meet presentation and regulatory requirements.
prerequisites: Approved label artwork and packaging materials.
safety_notes: Keep hands clear of moving machinery.

steps.title: Verify Labels
steps.body: Confirm correct SKU, vintage and artwork where applicable.

steps.title: Set Up Labeller
steps.body: Adjust guides and sensors as required.

steps.title: Run Test Bottles
steps.body: Check alignment, adhesion and appearance.

steps.title: Approve First-Off Samples
steps.body: Verify compliance with packaging standards.

steps.title: Monitor Production
steps.body: Inspect labels throughout the production run.

steps.title: Record Packaging Results
steps.body: Document inspections and corrective actions.

risks.prevention: Ensure bottles are clean and dry.

troubleshooting: Stop and adjust equipment if label alignment drifts outside specification.

title: Shrink Seals
summary: Application of shrink capsules and tamper-evident seals.
purpose: To ensure product presentation and tamper evidence.
safety_notes: Heat sources may be present. Avoid contact with heated components.

steps.title: Verify Materials
steps.body: Confirm correct seal type and colour.

steps.title: Apply Seals
steps.body: Position seals consistently on closures.

steps.title: Apply Heat
steps.body: Shrink seals according to equipment requirements.

steps.title: Inspect Appearance
steps.body: Verify uniform shrinkage and presentation.

steps.title: Remove Defects
steps.body: Segregate products with damaged seals.

steps.title: Record Completion
steps.body: Document packaging completion.

troubleshooting: Adjust heat settings if wrinkles or incomplete shrinkage occur.

title: Finished Goods Storage
summary: Storage requirements for packaged finished goods.
purpose: To protect product quality and maintain inventory accuracy.
safety_notes: Observe forklift exclusion zones and pallet stacking requirements.

steps.title: Verify Release Status
steps.body: Confirm product has been released by quality control.

steps.title: Apply Identification
steps.body: Ensure pallets display batch and product information.

steps.title: Transfer to Storage
steps.body: Move pallets to designated finished goods locations.

steps.title: Update Inventory
steps.body: Record storage location in VNDManuf.

steps.title: Maintain FIFO
steps.body: Rotate stock using first-in-first-out principles.

steps.title: Inspect Regularly
steps.body: Monitor for damage or storage issues.

title: Via Nova Vodka Product Knowledge
summary: Product knowledge guide for Via Nova Vodka.
purpose: To equip staff with accurate product information.
safety_notes: Responsible service of alcohol principles apply.

steps.title: Understand Product Style
steps.body: Via Nova Vodka is positioned as a clean, approachable modern vodka.

steps.title: Learn Key Characteristics
steps.body: Focus on purity, smoothness and versatility.

steps.title: Understand Production Philosophy
steps.body: The product reflects Via Nova's commitment to flavour clarity and efficiency.

steps.title: Know Consumer Occasions
steps.body: Suitable for mixed drinks, cocktails and simple serves.

steps.title: Understand Storage Requirements
steps.body: Store upright and out of direct sunlight.

troubleshooting: Refer to the latest approved specification sheet.

title: New Wave Gin Product Knowledge
summary: Overview of New Wave Gin and its market positioning.
purpose: To provide staff with a clear understanding of the New Wave brand.
safety_notes: Responsible service of alcohol principles apply.

steps.title: Understand the Brand
steps.body: New Wave Gin is designed to make gin more approachable to a broader audience.

steps.title: Learn Key Flavour Attributes
steps.body: Bright citrus, balanced juniper and approachable spice.

steps.title: Know the Target Consumer
steps.body: Consumers seeking modern, easy-drinking gin styles.

steps.title: Understand Brand Messaging
steps.body: Focus on innovation, flavour and accessibility.

steps.title: Learn Recommended Serves
steps.body: Serve with premium tonic and fresh citrus garnish.

troubleshooting: Refer to marketing resources for current positioning.
